TextENGNew: I'll tell you the conditions for unlocking C2 The Queen Carrier's Mother's Distrust in the World of the Furude Family.
changeReason: "Mother of a Queen" changed to "Queen Carrier's Mother" — the addition of "Carrier" references the Higurashi-specific concept of a queen carrier (女王感染者), which significantly changes who is being referred to and adds plot-relevant context.

TextENGNew:
B2 H170 in the World of 1980
B6 The Shirakawa Park Fall Accident in the World of 1980
...After viewing the above fragments, this one will become available.
changeReason: "An Accident at the Shirakawa Park" changed to "The Shirakawa Park Fall Accident" — the addition of "Fall" (転落) specifies the type of accident, providing meaningful context about the event.

TextENGNew:
And—
C5 The Third 'Specimen' in the World of the Furude Family
A3 One, Two, Three, Four in the World of Miyo Takano
...These fragments are also connected to its appearance.
changeReason: The original omits the fragment identifier "C5" from "Third 'Specimen'" which is present in the Japanese (C5 三番目の「検体」); the new translation correctly includes it, affecting how readers would locate this fragment.
